Julia's Slow Cooker Baked Beans

author: Mary Germick

Prep time ->

Cook time ->

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 1/2 lb. bacon, fried & diced
  • 1 medium onion, chopped
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • 1/2 cup vinegar
  • 1/2 tsp. ground mustard
  • 1/8 tsp. garlic powder
  • 1 can butter beans, drained
  • 1 can lima beans, drained
  • 1 can red beans, drained
  • 1 large can pork & beans, NOT drained

Directions

Mix all together in slow-cooker for several hours OR bake 1 hour @ 350.
